_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the AusMT custodian attribution profiles (C46, mirrors licenses.json). Edit ONLY here, then run `python contract/generate.py` to regenerate the PROFILES dict/object in engine/extract/_contract.py and portal/src/contract.js. A profile names how a custodian's required attribution renders inside the licence instrument (LICENSE.txt / LICENSE.md). Templates use Python str.format field names {licensor} {year} {source_title}; the JS mirror substitutes the same tokens in one left-to-right pass, so the two renderings cannot drift (pinned by engine/tests/fixtures/license_instrument_vectors.json on BOTH mirrors). `generic` = today's org (year) synthesis, formalised. `ga` = Geoscience Australia's prescribed form: an `attribution` line for verbatim reuse, a `derivative` line (AusMT modifies data, so this is GA's default AusMT rendering), and the s.5 `disclaimer`. Zero GA-custodian surveys exist today, so `ga` ships dormant-but-tested. NOTE: the s.5 `disclaimer` is rendered by license_instrument_text (C46-W3a) as the final paragraph of the Source-datasets block whenever a source's profile carries one; both mirrors pin it via license_instrument_vectors.json.

ga.derivative: Based on {source_title} by Geoscience Australia ({year}), used under CC-BY 4.0.
ga.disclaimer: This product incorporates data which is © Commonwealth of Australia (Geoscience Australia). The data has been used with the permission of Geoscience Australia under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International Licence. Geoscience Australia has not evaluated the data as altered and incorporated within this product, and gives no warranty regarding its accuracy, completeness, currency or suitability for any particular purpose.
ga._draft_note: wording pending owner confirmation against GA's published licensing page (owner decision C46-2, 2026-07-13)
